description: Fetch the latest articles from TechCrunch via WordPress REST API. Supports optional filtering by category (23 categories including AI, startups, security, etc.) and pagination. Returns ranked articles with title, URL, date, excerpt, and featured image. No authentication required.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category slug to filter by. Available: artificial-intelligence, startups, venture, security, apps, climate, biotech-health, commerce, cryptocurrency, enterprise, fintech, fundraising, gadgets, gaming, government-policy, hardware, media-entertainment, privacy, real-estate, robotics, social, space, transportation. Omit for all categories.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of articles per page (1-100, default: 20).
